subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Eternal Friend! He saith: Thy letter was presented before the Face, adorned as it was with the ornament of the Beloved's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دوست پاینده میفرماید کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر چون بطراز محبت محبوب مزین بود
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
